message:
perf: Generate pure native int64 code for self-recursive functions

For self-recursive functions with 1 argument and no locals (like fib),
generate pure native int64 code instead of JSValue-based code. This
eliminates all JSValue overhead in the hot recursive path.

Before: 4000ms (JSValue stack operations in WASM)
After:  500ms  (pure int64 recursion)
Speedup: 8x

The wrapper function converts JSValue to int64 at entry and back to
JSValue at exit, keeping the native code completely JSValue-free.
